heading: REVIEW—MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS
label: 133 REVIEW—MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS
notes: 1949ActThis section inserts in the chapter analysis of chapter 133 of title 28, U.S.C., a new item “2111,” in view of the insertion in such title, by another section of this bill, of a new section 2111.
